text:
On Sat, Jul 17, 1999 at 10:00:51AM +0200, domi@saargate.de wrote:
> 
> # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before

Please resubmit with the output of a diff -ruN xsane.old xsane.new.
Shell archives for upgrades are not accepted, see 
http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/porting.html#PORT-UPGRADING

-Chris
